exercises.name: Flat Bench Press
exercises.notes: Still at 60kg — sets 3 and 4 dropped off in the last logged session (9, 7 reps). Target 4×8 clean before stepping up. Log this.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: Holding at 14kg. Build 3 clean sets of 10 before moving up. Upper chest — slight arch, elbows ~75°.

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Holding at 12kg. Press fully overhead, controlled descent. Hit all 3×12 to earn 14kg next Push A.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.notes: Holding at 7kg. Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height. Drop to 6kg if form breaks down.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown
exercises.notes: Holding at 36kg. Elbows locked at sides, full extension at bottom. 3×12 clean = earn 38kg.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Holding at 24kg. Full stretch at bottom — that's the growth stimulus. Lock in 3×12 here.
